notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Colson Montgomery reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Bobby Witt Jr.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Tristan Peters reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Jac Caglianone.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, third baseman Miguel Vargas to second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Jacob Gonzalez. Michael Massey out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Starling Marte pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Starling Marte called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Kameron Misner. Colson Montgomery scores. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Braden Montgomery to 2nd.
